title: Joke Weapons
body:
### **_I have to sadly stop working on this mod_**
[context](https://bsky.app/profile/mochax3.bsky.social/post/3lullalf7uc25)
-

### Hey you! Yes you!
ever wanted to hit your friend with a **frying pan**? Well now you can with this mod!

In this mod, there will be a bunch of "joke weapons" that will be added to **your** Minecraft world!


stuff that is added
- Bat
- Frying Pan
- Yaoi Paddle
- Poleaxe (yes an irl poleaxe)  
- BIG BAMBOO STICK
- Hammer (piko~)
- Golden Hand
- Boxing Glove

Founder Weapons
- Meteor Shatterer
- Thuderclap
- Ro-Bio Syinge
- Gravitic Absolution


~~RNG~~



Discord Server:[Mochi Stand](https://discord.gg/ucPuFgNd4X)
